top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN fd.language = 'French' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.id = fd.id
WHERE c.faceName LIKE '%Story Spotlight%';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN fd.language = 'French' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.id = fd.id
WHERE c.faceName LIKE '%Story Spotlight%';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN fd.language = 'French' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE c.faceName LIKE '%Story Spotlight%';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN fd.language = 'French' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.id = fd.id
WHERE c.faceName LIKE '%Story Spotlight%';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN fd.language = 'French' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.id = fd.id
WHERE c.faceName LIKE '%Story Spotlight%';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN fd.language = 'French' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_french
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.id = fd.uuid
JOIN sets s ON c.setCode = s.code
WHERE s.name = 'Story Spotlight';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN fd.language = 'French' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE c.faceName LIKE '%Story Spotlight%';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN fd.language = 'French' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.id = fd.id
WHERE c.faceName LIKE '%Story Spotlight%';
